title: Bar Council of Delhi polls: Supreme Court stays vote count until Delhi HC verdict on alleged irregularities
description: The Supreme Court on Monday stayed the vote counting process for the Bar Council of Delhi elections amid allegations of tampering with ballot papers. A Bench of Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant and Justice Joymalya Bagchi also transferred a batch of petitions alleging such irregularities in the poll process to a special bench of the Delhi High Court.The matter was mentioned before the CJI-led Bench today by advocate Shobha Gupta, who flagged concerns that even tampered ballot papers were
